title: Missing_Colors
description: Use formatting codes to write colorfully on signs, chat and anvil.
body:
# Features
This plugin offers the possibility to use formatting codes to write colorfully on signs, chat and anvil.

# How it works
While writing you just use `&` instead of `§` to write down Minecraft's [formatting codes](https://minecraft.fandom.com/wiki/Formatting_codes).

# Permissions
- To use color codes on signs: `missing_colors.signs.color_codes`
- To use formatting codes on signs: `missing_colors.signs.formatting_codes​`
- To use color codes in chat: `missing_colors.chat.color_codes​`
- To use formatting codes in chat: `missing_colors.chat.formatting_codes`
- To use color codes at the anvil: `missing_colors.anvil.color_codes​`
- To use formatting codes at the anvil: `missing_colors.anvil.formatting_codes​`
- To get update notifications: `missing_colors.update `

![signs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hiFvJn4K/images/5a2e9a6986de259c4f9a298cae1fd795a7ceb704.png)
![anvil](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hiFvJn4K/images/31a2dedc0ebf120a33fb31b281ca8a8bbd620d0e.jpeg)
